body_text:
22:21 â September 2, 2022
Update to Wires Customization Request, Form 6493
We updated the Wires Customization Request, Form 6493, and related sections of the Wires Part to clarify which text is customizable. We also made minor editorial changes to the Wires Part.
Electronic Transactions Volume
Wires Part
Section 4.2, Description of Wires Customizable Elements
We clarified that the customizable text in the Confirmation and Receipt message boxes applies to the messages in the Wires application. The terms and conditions text on the printable confirmation and receipt is not customizable.
Section 4.3, Requesting Wires Customization Changes
We updated the figure for the Wires Customization Request, Form 6493, with the updated form.
Section 8.2, Granting Wires Access to a Secure Site User
We added the following: âEnsure that the new user has a 2-step security token assigned to their secure site profile if required. See the User Management part for procedures.â A 2-step security token is required for users requiring access to the Pending Incoming or Pending Outgoing menu options in Wires.
Section 16.3, Completing the Beneficiaryâs Financial Institution Section
We added the following: âThe selected beneficiaryâs financial institution information automatically populates in Wires.â This applies when the user enters the SWIFT, transit etc. or searches for and selects the beneficiaryâs financial institution in the list of search results.
Section 16.6, Completing the Beneficiary Section
We corrected a typo that referenced the Sender 3rd Party Details section instead of the Beneficiary 3rd Party Details section.
